overview: Mistral Medium 3 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Medium line. Released 2025-05-07. Mid-tier line balancing cost and capability for enterprise workloads.
What's notable in this version: Enterprise-focused mid-tier model; strong cost-to-performance (mistral-medium-2505).
